title: Figure_reviewer_response-I
author: Rafael Sebastián Fort
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by
description:
Figure. Small RNA sequencing reads mapped to vtRNAs and its correlation to promoter DNA methylation of NCI-60 human tumor cell lines. 

 A. Mapping to vtRNAs sequence of small RNA reads of the NCI-60 cell line RXF393L. B. Normalized expression of vtRNAs (small RNA reads mapped to vtRNA gene) expressed as log2(CPM+1) of small RNA seq data for 59 NCI-60 human tumor cell lines, publicly available (SRA: PRJNA390643). Small RNA seq analysis as Fort et al. 2020. C. Pairwise Spearman correlations of vtRNA promoter DNA methylation average beta-values data (GEO: GSE49143) and normalized expression of vtRNAs log2(CPM+1).
